title: GROUP_ADD missing subscription check: unsubscribed users can invite others
description: ws.rs:1368 GROUP_ADD has rate_limit check but no require_subscription check. GROUP_CREATE (line 1317) and GROUP_SEND (line 1736) both enforce subscription when require_subscription is set. An expired-subscription user who knows a valid group_id (from their subscribed period) can still call GROUP_ADD to add new members, bypassing payment gating for the invite operation. Consistent with GROUP_CREATE and GROUP_SEND, GROUP_ADD should check subscribed_flag when require_subscription is true.
